Comments: Note: The PRAM1 - STK11 rearrangement is an inversion that results in a fusion of PRAM1 exons 1 - 5 to STK11 exons 1 - 9. One of the breakpoints is within STK11 exon 1. The fusion includes a part of the kinase domain of STK11. Functional significance is undetermined.

Comments: Note: The STK11 rearrangement is a deletion of exon 1. One of the breakpoints is within exon 1. The rearrangement includes a part of the kinase domain of STK11.
